faq.title: Got Questions? We Have Got Answers.

whatIs.question: What is Bekur HRMS?
whatIs.answer: Bekur HRMS is an all-in-one human resource management platform designed for modern, distributed teams. It covers employee management, payroll, attendance, leave, performance, and more.

freeTrial.question: Is there a free trial?
freeTrial.answer: Yes. Every plan includes a 30-day free trial with full access to features. No credit card is required to get started.

security.question: How secure is my company data?
security.answer: We use enterprise-grade encryption, role-based access controls, and regular security audits. Your data is isolated per tenant and never shared across organizations.

integrations.question: Can I migrate from another HR system?
integrations.answer: Absolutely. Our onboarding team helps you import employee data, configure policies, and transition smoothly from your existing tools.

support.question: What kind of support do you offer?
support.answer: All plans include email support. Professional and Enterprise plans include priority support with dedicated onboarding assistance.

cancel.question: Can I cancel or change my plan anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.
